summary: Completed comprehensive backend authentication testing for Family Care Organizer app. All 12 auth endpoints tested successfully, confirming the Apple Sign-In bug fixes are working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - Returns healthy status with DB connection
POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials (demo@familycareorganizer.com / Demo2026!) - Returns token and user
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials - Returns 401 with clear error message
POST /api/auth/login with empty body - Returns 422 with clear validation error
POST /api/auth/login with missing password - Returns 422 with clear validation error
POST /api/auth/apple with new user - Creates user and returns token
POST /api/auth/apple with returning user (same user_id, no email) - Returns existing user
POST /api/auth/apple with empty user_id - Returns 400 error with clear message
POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user and returns token
GET /api/auth/me with valid token - Returns user data
POST /api/auth/google with google_user_id and email - Creates/returns user successfully
